t4__fp16__medium.reason: Needs 2 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak output traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__fp16__heavy.reason: Needs 11 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak output traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__int8__heavy.reason: Needs 7 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak output traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

t4__int4__heavy.reason: Needs 5 t4 GPUs for VRAM and peak output traffic; Standard_NC4as_T4_v3 exposes 1.

compositions.*.inputs.self_host_throughp.label: calculated
